final_text:
The first principal component explains **56.47%** of the total variance in the log10-transformed gene expression dataset.

The computation:
- Loaded the 2456 genes × 222 samples expression matrix and transposed it to samples × genes
- Applied log10(x + 1) transformation
- Ran PCA with all 2456 components (to capture full trace of the covariance matrix)
- PC1 variance = 49.18, total variance = 87.10, ratio = 56.4717%

FINAL ANSWER: 56.47
